results.title: Will the US-Iran peace deal hold? Three pressure points testing the agreement
results.description: Analysts describe the agreement as a structure rather than a final settlement, with many important details still open to negotiation.

results.title: Sikh caretaker couple killed in cold blood inside Pakistan gurudwara; Indian leaders condemn
results.description: Northlines Newsdesk In a glaring insecure environment prevailing in Pakistan, a Sikh caretaker couple was shot dead inside a gurdwara in Pakistan’s northwestern Khyber Pakhtunkhwa province on Wednesday. The incident occurred in Babu Mohallah locality of Mardan, about 60 km northwest of Peshawar. This triggered sharp reactions in India. According to the Mardan District Police [...] The post Sikh caretaker couple killed in cold blood inside Pakistan gurudwara; Indian leaders condemn appeared first on Northlines .
